---
title: "Research"
format: html
reference-location: section
page-layout: full
---

# Publications

::: {.paper}
### Trading Trash on Tricycles {.paper-title}
**Job Market Paper**  
with Coauthor Name

[Abstract](#abs-jmp){.paper-link} · [Paper](files/jmp.pdf){.paper-link} · [Slides](files/jmp_slides.pdf){.paper-link}

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" #abs-jmp}
#### Abstract
aaa
:::
:::

# Working papers

# Works in progress
